task: Predicting Stellar Class (multi-class: GALAXY / QSO / STAR)
key_ideas: Astronomical color indices (u-g, g-r, r-i, i-z, ...) from SDSS photometry
redshift is the dominant separator (STAR~0.07, GALAXY~0.51, QSO~1.88)
class_weight='balanced' + per-class score multipliers tuned for Balanced Accuracy
note: GBDT ensemble trained on Kaggle GPU; CV matches public LB closely (no overfit).
